display_text: Io Aghanim's Scepter: Spirits now passively spawn around Io constantly. This upgrade counters anti-push and anti-teamfight mechanics by providing continuous area denial and slow effects, enhancing Io's role as a persistent teamfight nuisance.
search_text: Io Aghanim Scepter anti-push anti-teamfight area denial slow persistent teamfight

display_text: Io Aghanim's Shard: Tether now damages enemies touching it while healing Io for 50% of the damage dealt. This upgrade counters anti-heal and anti-sustain mechanics, transforming Io into a more durable and aggressive support during engagements.
search_text: Io Aghanim Shard anti-heal anti-sustain durable aggressive support healing damage
